# Portfolio Project Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Next.js portfolio website for Roy De La Torre - a WordPress & Shopify developer.

## Project Context
- This is a professional portfolio website showcasing development skills and projects
- The design should be modern, responsive, and professional
- Main sections: Hero/Banner, Features/Services, Portfolio/Projects, Resume/Education, Contact
- Tech stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

## Coding Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all components
- Follow Next.js 15 App Router patterns
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Implement responsive design (mobile-first approach)
- Use semantic HTML for accessibility
- Follow React best practices and hooks
- Create reusable components where appropriate

## Styling Guidelines
- Use dark theme as primary (matching the original design)
- Professional color scheme: dark backgrounds, white/light text
- Smooth animations and transitions
- Modern, clean design aesthetic
- Ensure proper contrast for accessibility

## Component Structure
- Create components in `src/components/` directory
- Use proper TypeScript interfaces for props
- Implement proper error handling
- Follow naming conventions (PascalCase for components)
